title: Allow more business branding across the interface

posts.author: Kristina_ECM (Kristina Bacic)
posts.cookedHtml:
As a consultant looking to send clients to my boards to use for colaboration, communication and tracking, it would be great if the interface was able to look and feel like my brand rather than the Monday.com brand.
Eg.

  • could remove Monday branding and ads
  • could add business banners and logo buttons more flexibly and background images to the interface
  • could resize the logo and branding options for those with longer logos (who don’t have a short version) as those isn’t properly visible in the tiny current size

I’d like if the tool felt like clients were experiencing my brand as part of their experience.
